name: Chicken with Lentils
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup dry white wine or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and fat from chicken pieces.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick Dutch oven or 12-inch skillet until hot.
3. Cook chicken in oil over medium heat about 15 minutes or until light brown on all sides; drain.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except parsley; break up tomatoes.
5. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer 35 to 40 minutes or until juices of chicken run clear and the lentils are tender.
7. Sprinkle with parsley.
